race.comment: Tricky race to assess with a few of these facing the starter for the first time. Of the raced brigade, I AM THAT GIRL (7) was just behind the placings in both runs in her first campaign before being tipped out for further time to furnish. Has since revved up for this with two recent trials and gets the reliable Gollan/Jones combination. Should run a big race while fresh. OLIVONI (8) is on debut but has looked handy winning the past couple of trials and Harley stays on top for race day. Respect any market confidence. DUKE OF ALBEMARLE (1) is another at the races for the first time but saluted in his only trial and is sure to be well-educated out of the Schweida barn. Keep an eye on betting moves. LANGAN (3) is next best with race experience on his side.
